title: ControllerValidationResult
description: Structured validation result from the orchestration controller. Schema version 1.0.0. Encodes the outcome of a dispatch, validation stage, or workflow run. Fail-closed by default: passed is false and final_exit_status is 1 until positive evidence is recorded.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task being validated.

workflow_state.description: Current workflow state at the time of validation.

requested_role.description: The role that was requested for dispatch.

selected_adapter.description: The adapter class name selected for the role.

selected_validators.description: Paths of validator scripts selected for this task.

required_inputs.description: List of input artifact paths required by the adapter.

resolved_inputs.description: Subset of required_inputs that were resolved on disk.

checks_expected.description: Total number of checks expected to execute.

checks_executed.description: Number of checks that actually ran.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact file contents.

artifacts_consumed.description: Artifacts consumed during validation with their SHA-256 hashes.

transition_attempted.description: The state transition that was attempted.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the transition decision.

transition_result.description: Outcome of the state transition check.

blocking_findings.description: Findings that block a PASS verdict. Must be empty for passed to be true.

errors.description: Error messages. Errors are always blocking.

warnings.description: Warning messages. Warnings do not block a PASS verdict.

passed.description: Overall PASS/FAIL verdict. Can only be true when checks_executed > 0 AND checks_failed == 0 AND len(blocking_findings) == 0.

final_exit_status.description: Exit status code: 0 for PASS, 1 for FAIL.

then.description: Rule: passed can only be true when checks_executed > 0 AND checks_failed == 0 AND len(blocking_findings) == 0.
